MELItem.Title: Semi Lever Gear Hydraulic Isolation Valve (787-10: VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A875, VN-A876, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879)

ListItem.Para: Landing gear is secured in the down position.
Airplane is dispatched in accordance with the AFM Landing Gear Extended appendix.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Secure the landing gear in the down position (AMM DDG 32-30-04).

ListItem.Para: Install landing gear downlock pins (dispatch tool J32011) for airplane flight with landing gear locked in the extended position.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
MLG DOOR CTRL VLV OPEN-1
MLG DOOR CTRL VLV OPEN-2
MLG L LOCK 1
MLG L LOCK 2
MLG R LOCK 1
MLG R LOCK 2
LG LEVER LOCK
On the MISC SYSTEM CTRLS (MSC) maintenance page, set the Overspeed Warning switch to GEAR DOWN.
The airplane must be dispatched using the AFM Landing Gear Extended Appendix.
Determine flight planning information by selecting Gear Down Dispatch in the Boeing performance software.

Note.Para: The FMC does not support certain provisions for operations with the landing gear extended.

ListItem.Para: VMO GEAR DOWN memo message will be displayed.
Inoperative solenoid is deactivated.
Remaining valve control solenoid is verified to operate normally once each flight day.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the inoperative valve control solenoid circuit and verify the remaining valve control solenoid circuit operates normally once each flight day (AMM-DDG 32-30-04).

ListItem.Para: On the LANDING GEAR CONTROL maintenance page 3, identify the inoperative solenoid circuit (1 or 2).

Note.Para: The inoperative solenoid circuit will have a blank display under ISOLATION VALVE MODULE.

ListItem.Para: Deactivate the inoperative valve control solenoid circuit (1 or 2).
For inoperative valve control solenoid circuit-1, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker MLG HYD ISO VLV ENABLE 1 and lock with an INOP tag.
For inoperative valve control solenoid circuit-2, using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker MLG HYD ISO VLV ENABLE 2 and lock with an INOP tag.
Verify the remaining valve control solenoid circuit operates normally once each flight day.
Confirm the landing gear control lever is in the DOWN position.
Install landing gear downlock pins.
Confirm all landing gear doors are open and all three landing gear door safety valve handles are in the SAFE position. If necessary, open the landing gear doors using the P56 switches.
Pressurize the center hydraulic system.
Set the ground test switch to the ENABLE position.
Set the landing gear lever to the UP position and after 5-seconds set the landing gear lever to the DOWN position.
Use CMCF to start the Special Function LGAC SLG ISOLATION VALVE TEST.

Note.Para: The telescoping pistons on both left and right semi lever gear will retract. Retraction may require approximately 17-seconds.
Do not stop the CMCF test or navigate away from the CMCF test page so that the ground test remains running.

ListItem.Para: Use CMCF to stop the Special Function LGAC SLG ISOLATION VALVE TEST.

Note.Para: The telescoping pistons on both left and right semi lever gear will extend. Extension may require approximately 2-seconds.

ListItem.Para: Return the ground test switch to NORM.
Remove pressure from the center hydraulic system.
Remove landing gear downlock pins.
